reference: I am a thirty-three-year-old woman. I have a constant dull pain in my upper right abdomen; it has lasted about twenty-four hours now. The pain is just below my ribcage and radiates into my back. It worsens when I stand up straight or twist my abdomen. There is a slight burning sensation and stabbing pain every now and then, and the pain is much worse when I cough or sneeze.
text: I am a person who is very sensitive. I am sensitive to the things that happen. I am sensitive to the things that happen. I am sensitive to the things that happen. I am sensitive to the things that happen.
